description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a matte olive and black finish. The body is streamlined with a prominent, thick barrel and a distinctive thumbhole stock, which provides ergonomic support for the user. The upper section includes a robust, squared receiver with a rail-like structure, likely for mounting optics or accessories. The trigger guard is integrated into the stock, forming a continuous, elongated loop with finger grooves for improved grip. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The shotgun lacks visible external pumps or levers, suggesting a semi-automatic action mechanism.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte olive and black finish, thumbhole stock, and integrated trigger guard. The design is modern and ergonomic, with a robust barrel and squared receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the thumbhole stock, thick barrel, and squared receiver.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the receiver and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the thumbhole stock and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel with the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short and thick barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, integrated with the stock, featuring finger grooves and a continuous loop
